title: CS HOME
description:
A simple home system.
/home opens a GUI showing all player homes.
body:
**💻 Description - CSHome v2.0**

CSHome is a modern, lightweight, and advanced home-management plugin. 
Players can effortlessly set, delete, and teleport to their homes using a beautiful paginated GUI. 
The plugin is highly optimized, lag-free, and fully customizable through the config.
Developed by Rohit | Powered by Craft Studio.

---

✨ Features

/home -> Opens the interactive Homes GUI
/sethome -> Auto-finds an empty slot and creates a home
/delhome <id> -> Removes a specific home
/cshome admin <player> -> Open Admin GUI to manage other players
/cshome reload -> Reloads the config

Supports up to 70 homes across 10 GUI pages
Default free homes (e.g., first 3 homes need no permissions)
Safe teleport system (cancels if the player moves)
Full HEX Color support (<##RRGGBB>)
Configurable sounds, particles, messages, and GUI design

---

🔐 Permissions (Important for Admins)

Permission               Description

home.<id>                Access extra home slots (e.g., home.4, home.5)
cshome.admin             Access base admin commands
cshome.admin.view        View any player's homes
cshome.admin.teleport    Teleport to any player's homes
cshome.admin.delete      Delete any player's homes

![INFORMATION](https://i.ibb.co/CK75jcw4/enhance-mhgtesrcsbxys0eznrxo.png)
